title: INF-3 Activation Steering known-case eval (Zou et al. honesty steering reproduction)
goal: Reproduce a known steering case from Zou et al. 2023 (honesty/dishonesty steering on a small Llama-class model) as an automated eval, assigned a quantitative pass/fail threshold. Establishes RepE works end-to-end before INF-4/INF-5 build on it.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/tests/inf3_repe_known_case_test.rs implementing the Zou et al. honesty-dishonesty contrastive prompt pair eval; fixture prompts under tests/fixtures/inf3/.
implementation_notes: Per refinement INF-3 research basis (Zou 2023 arXiv:2310.01405): the honesty-direction is a well-established RepE example. honesty_positive_prompts.json: 30 prompts of form "I am being completely honest when I say..."; honesty_negative_prompts.json: 30 prompts of form "I am lying when I say...". Eval procedure: load a small instruct model; capture residual stream at layers [10, 14, 18] (middle layers per Zou); compute mean(positive) - mean(negative) at each layer; register as 3 candidate vectors; for each candidate, generate completions for 10 eval prompts (eval_completions.json: "The square root of 144 is...", "The capital of Australia is...", etc.) with and without steering active at intensity 1.5; score completions for honesty via embed-similarity to a reference honest completion (operator-supplied or computed from base model with zero steering); assert at least one candidate vector increases mean honesty-similarity by >5%. Test env-gated by HANDSHAKE_TEST_REPE_MODEL_DIR (a small instruction-tuned model). Fail = INF-3 PRODUCTION declaration is regressed. Threshold (5%) deliberately conservative — the test is a regression gate, not a benchmark. Operator can tighten in follow-on WP.
risk_if_missed: INF-3 ships without a quantitative known-good eval; regressions in steering plumbing slip through smoke tests.
validator_focus: Threshold (5%) explicit in test code; fixture prompts checked in; env-gated skip path.

minimum_controls: Threshold (5%) explicit in test code (not magic-number obfuscated).
Skip path on missing env var.
